All 4 deals verified in seed_data.php: Apex (line 249), Horizon (line 257), Coastal (line 253), Ironclad (line 260). Their orgs (Apex Dynamics Inc, Horizon Telecom, Coastal Retail Holdings, Ironclad Insurance) have NO injected Critical or Major tickets. Setup sets all closingdates to 2026-06-30 (future). These deals should not be modified by the agent.

Rule 1 applies: closingdate 2026-02-15 < task date 2026-03-19. Per task description, set stage='Closed Lost', probability=0, add '[Q1-AUDIT] Auto-closed - past due' to description. Rule 1 overrides Rules 2 and 3. BrightPath Education has no injected tickets, so only Rule 1 applies.

Rule 1 applies: closingdate 2026-01-30 < task date 2026-03-19. Per task description, set stage='Closed Lost', probability=0, add '[Q1-AUDIT] Auto-closed - past due' to description. Catalyst Biotech has no injected tickets.

Rule 2 applies: Atlas Logistics Corp has open Critical ticket (TT-REC-001). Deal closingdate set to 2026-06-30 (not past-due, so Rule 1 does not apply). Atlas also has a Major ticket (TT-REC-005) but Critical takes precedence per Rule 2. Expected: stage='Needs Analysis', probability=10, description contains '[Q1-AUDIT] Held - critical support escalation'.

Rule 2 applies: Pinnacle Healthcare Systems has open Critical ticket (TT-REC-002). Deal closingdate set to 2026-06-30 (not past-due). Expected: stage='Needs Analysis', probability=10, description contains '[Q1-AUDIT] Held - critical support escalation'.

Rule 3 applies: GreenLeaf Manufacturing has open Major ticket (TT-REC-003) but no Critical tickets. Deal closingdate set to 2026-06-30 (not past-due). Setup normalized probability to 40. Per task description, reduce by 20 points: 40-20=20. Expected: probability=20, description contains '[Q1-AUDIT] Risk-adjusted - major support issue'. Stage is not specified in expected outcomes (no change required by Rule 3).

Rule 3 applies: Sterling Financial Group has open Major ticket (TT-REC-004, status='In Progress' which counts as open per task rules) but no Critical tickets. Deal closingdate set to 2026-06-30 (not past-due). Setup normalized probability to 70. Per task description, reduce by 20 points: 70-20=50. Expected: probability=50, description contains '[Q1-AUDIT] Risk-adjusted - major support issue'.

Design parameter for the scoring rubric. Verifier.py is a stub (always returns 100). The threshold applies to the VLM checklist verifier scoring. 55/100 means the agent needs to successfully process approximately 5-6 of the 10 deals correctly to pass.

privileged_info_summary: This task requires auditing 10 open deals in vtiger CRM's Potentials module by cross-referencing each deal's Organization against the HelpDesk (tickets) module. After setup, the database contains exactly 12 deals: 2 are Closed Won (Nexus SCADA Security Assessment, Vanguard SOC Expansion) and excluded from the audit. The 10 open deals have these expected outcomes: (Rule 1 - Past-due) 'BrightPath LMS Platform Build' (org: BrightPath Education, close date: 2026-02-15) must be set to Closed Lost/0%/[Q1-AUDIT] Auto-closed; 'Catalyst LIMS Implementation' (org: Catalyst Biotech, close date: 2026-01-30) must be set to Closed Lost/0%/[Q1-AUDIT] Auto-closed. (Rule 2 - Critical tickets) 'Atlas Supply Chain Analytics' (org: Atlas Logistics Corp, which has Critical ticket 'CRITICAL: Fleet GPS tracking system - complete outage since 03/17' AND a Major ticket 'Warehouse barcode scanner firmware incompatibility' — Critical takes precedence) must be set to Needs Analysis/10%/[Q1-AUDIT] Held; 'Pinnacle EHR Security Upgrade' (org: Pinnacle Healthcare Systems, which has Critical ticket 'CRITICAL: EHR patient data sync failure - 72hr data gap') must be set to Needs Analysis/10%/[Q1-AUDIT] Held. (Rule 3 - Major tickets) 'GreenLeaf IoT Factory Monitoring' (org: GreenLeaf Manufacturing, Major ticket 'Production line IoT sensor calibration drift affecting QA', starting probability=40) must have probability reduced to 20 with [Q1-AUDIT] Risk-adjusted tag; 'Sterling Trading Platform Modernization' (org: Sterling Financial Group, Major ticket 'Quarterly compliance report generation failing since Feb update' with status 'In Progress', starting probability=70) must have probability reduced to 50 with [Q1-AUDIT] Risk-adjusted tag. (No action) 'Apex Cloud Migration Phase 2', 'Horizon 5G Network Planning', 'Coastal Retail E-Commerce Replatform', and 'Ironclad Claims AI Platform' should NOT be modified — their organizations have no qualifying open Critical/Major tickets and their close dates are 2026-06-30 (future). Finally, the agent must create a report titled 'Q1 2026 Pipeline Reconciliation' as a Tabular Report on the Potentials module. The description field in vtiger is stored in vtiger_crmentity.description (not vtiger_potential), and the agent edits it through the UI's Description field on the deal edit form. All ticket severity/status values are visible in the HelpDesk module's list view and detail view. The 5 injected tickets use ticket_no values TT-REC-001 through TT-REC-005.
